title: A Toothless Iran? Missile and Drone Strikes Show It Can Still Inflict Pain.
summary: A wave of strikes across the Middle East in recent days shows that Iran has not lost the capacity to retaliate.

title: Yemen’s Houthis Fire at Israel and Vow Further Attacks

title: ‘No Kings’ Protests Decry Trump and His Agenda
summary: Thousands of organized demonstrations stretched across the country. Minnesota was a focal point of the protests after a tumultuous immigration crackdown.

title: No Kings Protests Held Across the U.S.: Photos and Videos
summary: It’s the third time that the coalition behind the “No Kings” movement has organized events to protest President Trump and his policies. In the United States, more than 3,000 demonstrations were planned.

title: A Challenge for ‘No Kings’ Protests, the Third Time Around
summary: Organizers want this to be the largest protest yet. But is hitting a number enough to deliver an effective political movement?

summary: The deadlock that left the Department of Homeland Security shuttered highlighted Republican divisions that are flaring ahead of the midterm elections.

title: F.B.I. Said to Dig Up Old Investigative Files on Democratic Lawmaker
summary: The urgent instructions at the Trump administration’s behest to gather and relay the files on Representative Eric Swalwell have alarmed some career law enforcement officials.

title: Record Number of T.S.A. Employees Called Out on Friday
summary: President Trump signed a memo late Friday ordering the Department of Homeland Security to restore pay to airport screeners.

summary: Conference organizers presented the poll results as a rebuttal to narratives that Republicans were split over the Iran war and support for Israel.

title: I Saw Something New in San Francisco
summary: Marshall McLuhan was right about Claude, too.

title: Technology Weakens Our Minds. It’s Time to Resist.
summary: Just as we changed our thinking around physical fitness, we need to change our attitude toward cognitive fitness.

title: The Slum in Gangnam, the Richest Part of Seoul
summary: The city wants to redevelop a shantytown in Gangnam district, where hundreds are defying eviction, fighting for a right to own a home in an area notorious for the exorbitant cost of housing.

title: Can This Russian Bakery Survive a 3,500% Tax Increase?
summary: The challenges faced by a small-business owner near Moscow highlight how Russia’s war-drained economy is on the doorstep of a major crisis.

title: James Tolkan, a Tough-Talking Actor in ‘Back to the Future’ and ‘Top Gun,’ Dies at 94
summary: Mr. Tolkan’s career spanned decades but his breakout roles came as an authority figure in two popular films of the mid-1980s.

title: Astronaut’s Condition That Led to Space Station Evacuation Remains a Mystery
summary: The astronaut, Michael Fincke, experienced a medical emergency in January that rendered him unable to speak, he said.
